TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ka tou wæ'i k'anna ni-roua ta ti Joannes ka Tama Eulough matta-sasou tou pæulæpæu-lægh ki Judea.
Ka tou wæ'i k'anna niroua ta ti Joannes ka Tama Eulough mattasasou tou pæulæpæulægh ki Judea.
S.TRANSL: Ende in die dagen quam Joannes de Dooper predikende in de woefftijne ban Judea
In those days came John the Baptist, preaching in the wilderness of Judaea,
那時，有施洗的約翰出來，在猶太的曠野傳道，說：

S.FORM: Koun; Si lalâ (pa-salikough-â ki vana-oumi ki rygh) ka ni-mou-touk ta pei-sasou-an ki tounoun ki vulluvullum.
Koun; Si lalâ (pasalikoughâ ki vanaoumi ki rygh) ka nimoutouk ta peisasouan ki tounoun ki vulluvullum.
S.TRANSL: Ende segghende Bekeert u : want het Koninckrick Der Hemelen is na-by gekomen.
And saying, Repent ye: for the kingdom of heaven is at hand.
＂天國近了，你們應當悔改！＂

S.FORM: Ka teni ta ti atta ka ni-pa-sousou-en ki Mattæi-tan ka ti Esajas, koun; Yngau ki Makou-lan-gægh tou pæulæpæulægh, Si-d'a d'arang-â paka-parilpil ki darang ki MEIRANG, pei-tiktik-au ta 'ouh-kakoun tyn.
Ka teni ta ti atta ka nipasousouen ki Mattæitan ka ti Esajas, koun; Yngau ki Makoulangægh tou pæulæpæulægh, Sid'a d'arangâ pakaparilpil ki darang ki MEIRANG, peitiktikau ta 'ouhkakoun tyn.
S.TRANSL: Want dese is het ban den welcken ghesproken is doo? Jelaiam den Propheet segghende De stemme des roependen inde woeftijne Bereydt den wegh des Heeren markt syne paden recht.
For this is he that was spoken of by the prophet Esaias, saying, The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of the Lord, make his paths straight.
這人就是先知以賽亞所說的。他說：＂在曠野有人聲喊着說：

S.FORM: Teni ta ti Joannes ka ni-akou-mea ki pam-mammi-en tyn ka na rivyng ki louang, ka akou-tououk (ka kemel k'ma-qua) ki æ'it appa ka na koura'æu, ka ni-maid ki valut tyn, ka kan-nin tyn idahi na houwallau-appa ta anna.

Teni ta ti Joannes ka niakoumea ki pammammien tyn ka na rivyng ki louang, ka akoutououk (ka kemel k'maqua) ki æ'it appa ka na koura'æu, ka nimaid ki valut tyn, ka kannin tyn idahi na houwallauappa ta anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende deselbe Joannes hadde hadde lijne kleedinghe ban kemels hapr ende eenen lederen gordel om ijne lenden: ende shn boedtsel was sprinckhanen ende wilden bonigh. _-
And the same John had his raiment of camel's hair, and a leathern girdle about his loins; and his meat was locusts and wild honey.
這約翰身穿駱駝毛的衣服，腰束皮帶，吃的是蝗蟲、野蜜。

S.FORM: Tou kidi kanna ni't pæpæ-næh mou qua tyni-æn ta Jerusalem, ymdei-au-appa ta Judea, ymmud-appa ki fat ka da poudap-an ka tou hivat ki Jordaan.
Tou kidi kanna ni't pæpænæh mou qua tyniæn ta Jerusalem, ymdeiauappa ta Judea, ymmudappa ki fat ka da poudapan ka tou hivat ki Jordaan.
S.TRANSL: Doe is tot Hem uptgegaen Jerusalem ende geheel Judea ende het gehee is landt rontom den Jorden
Then went out to him Jerusalem, and all Judaea, and all the region round about Jordan,
那時，耶路撒冷和猶太全地，並約旦河一帶地方的人，都出去到約翰那裏，

S.FORM: Ka ni-'æuloug han tyn ta teni tou' Jordaan, tou pou-pæ-pænæg-hen ki varau nein-ra.
Ka ni'æuloug han tyn ta teni tou' Jordaan, tou poupæpænæghen ki varau neinra.
S.TRANSL: Ende wierden ban hem ghedoopt in de Jordaen belijdende hare sonden, |
And were baptized of him in Jordan, confessing their sins.
承認他們的罪，在約旦河裏受他的洗。

S.FORM: Teni ra, dou 'ararau-en tyn ta hmabatoung ki Fariseen ki Sadduceen tou 'æuloug-han tyn, ni-k'ma neini-æn; Na kákubkub ki 't poung, ti mang ta ni-madouk ymoumi-an pa-ilpout ki nḡale ka rou roumang-ah.
Teni ra, dou 'ararauen tyn ta hmabatoung ki Fariseen ki Sadduceen tou 'æuloughan tyn, nik'ma neiniæn; Na kákubkub ki 't poung, ti mang ta nimadouk ymoumian pailpout ki nḡale ka rou roumangah.
S.TRANSL: Hydan siendebeleban de Pharireen ende Sadduceen tot siinen Boop komen sprack tot hat Gy adderen geboedsels wie heeft u amnghewesen te blieden ban den tockomenden toorne +
But when he saw many of the Pharisees and Sadducees come to his baptism, he said unto them, O generation of vipers, who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?
約翰看見許多法利賽人和撒都該人也來受洗，就對他們說：＂毒蛇的種類！誰指示你們逃避將來的忿怒呢？

S.FORM: Anna ta makka-voua ki voua ka na ka'ang-al-len pasalikough-noumi si-lala.
Anna ta makkavoua ki voua ka na ka'angallen pasalikoughnoumi silala.
S.TRANSL: Beenght dan bruchten boort der bekeeringe weerdigh.
Bring forth therefore fruits meet for repentance:
你們要結出果子來，與悔改的心相稱。

S.FORM: Ynna pou-kidi ymoumi-an pæg-dimdim pæg-mado pæg-k'ma-hynna; Akou na Rarama'n kame ti Abraham-an. Ka pasousou-en-'au-kamou ra, ka pa-ilpough ta Alid pæ æhphit ki vahto k'anna ki alalak ti Abraham-an.
Ynna poukidi ymoumian pægdimdim pægmado pægk'mahynna; Akou na Rarama'n kame ti Abrahaman. Ka pasousouen'aukamou ra, ka pailpough ta Alid pæ æhphit ki vahto k'anna ki alalak ti Abrahaman.
S.TRANSL: Ende en meynt niet by u felben te segghen Wy hebben Abraham tot eenen Dader. Want tk seggheu dat Godt selfs uyt dese steenen kan Abraham kinderen berwecken.
And think not to say within yourselves, We have Abraham to our father: for I say unto you, that God is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham.
不要自己心裏說：＂有亞伯拉罕為我們的祖宗。＂我告訴你們，上帝能從這些石頭中給亞伯拉罕興起子孫來。

S.FORM: Hnyn-da ni-atta quan ta vouthau tou patar ki pærænnæ-rænnæh: ymmid ki pærænnæh ka assi makka-voua ki voua kama-mariang, t'aghta-aul-ato maryng tou apoei
Hnynda niatta quan ta vouthau tou patar ki pærænnærænnæh: ymmid ki pærænnæh ka assi makkavoua ki voua kamamariang, t'aghtaaulato maryng tou apoei
S.TRANSL: Ende is ook alreede de byle aen de wortel der boomen geleght : alle boom dan die gheen goede brucht boort boort en brengt worde uptghehouwen ende in t bye orpen.
And now also the axe is laid unto the root of the trees: therefore every tree which bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.
現在斧子已經放在樹根上，凡不結好果子的樹就砍下來，丟在火裏。

S.FORM: Ti jau ta mæulough ymou-mi-æn ki raloum tou si-lala-an; Ra teni ka si-æuh jauwan mou-qua ta marareih maligh iau-an, ka assi koh tou keirang-an mei-qua ki tatapil tyn-da; teni ta mmæuloug-ah y-moumi-æn ki I-oep-an ka Dlligh Matiktik, ki apoei-appa-ra

Ti jau ta mæulough ymoumiæn ki raloum tou silalaan; Ra teni ka siæuh jauwan mouqua ta marareih maligh iauan, ka assi koh tou keirangan meiqua ki tatapil tynda; teni ta mmæulougah ymoumiæn ki Ioepan ka Dlligh Matiktik, ki apoeiappara
S.TRANSL: Ick doopeu wel met water tot bekeeringe : maer die na my komt is ltercker dan ick wiens (chornen ick niet weerdigh en ben ( hem nae ) te dragen : die falu mec den Hepligen Geelt ende met
I indeed baptize you with water unto repentance. but he that cometh after me is mightier than I, whose shoes I am not worthy to bear: he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost, and with fire:
我是用水給你們施洗，叫你們悔改。但那在我以後來的，能力比我更大，我就是給他提鞋也不配。他要用聖靈與火給你們施洗。

S.FORM: Ka varakou tyn pei-qua'n ki rima tyn, ka paka-kouptigh-ah ki dæddæddæ-en-tyn, ka palilid-duah tyn ta yroung tou kouvau: Houdægh-da pa-yllamag-euh tyn tou apoei ka assi hmahei pa-'i-ougp-pun.
Ka varakou tyn peiqua'n ki rima tyn, ka pakakouptighah ki dæddæddæentyn, ka palilidduah tyn ta yroung tou kouvau: Houdæghda payllamageuh tyn tou apoei ka assi hmahei pa'iougppun.
S.TRANSL: Wiens Wan in (ijne handt is ende sal sijnen dorch-bloer door fuyberen ende sijne tarwe in ijne schuere t famen brengen efi fal her kaf met onuptblusschelick byer berbranden.
Whose fan is in his hand, and he will throughly purge his floor, and gather his wheat into the garner; but he will burn up the chaff with unquenchable fire.
他手裏拿着簸箕，要揚淨他的場，把麥子收在倉裏，把糠用不滅的火燒盡了。＂ （可1‧9－11；路3‧21－22）

S.FORM: Tou kidi kanna ni-irouä ta ti Jesus makka-Galilæa tou Jordaan ti Joannes-an, alei ka pa-'æu-loug-eih tyn tyni-æn.
Tou kidi kanna niirouä ta ti Jesus makkaGalilæa tou Jordaan ti Joannesan, alei ka pa'æulougeih tyn tyniæn.
S.TRANSL: Doe quam Jefus ban Galilea nae den Jordaen tot Joannem om ban hem ge-
Then cometh Jesus from Galilee to Jordan unto John, to be baptized of him.
當下，耶穌從加利利來到約旦河，見了約翰，要受他的洗。

S.FORM: Ra ni-ouhang mavagh ta ti Joannes tyni-æn, koun-hia; Kidi-atou-mau ka 'æulough-ei-mhou-koh, ka iroua kow mou-qua jau-an?
Ra niouhang mavagh ta ti Joannes tyniæn, kounhia; Kidiatoumau ka 'æulougheimhoukoh, ka iroua kow mouqua jauan?
S.TRANSL: Doch Joannes weygerde hem seer feggeride My noodigh ban u gedoopt te worden ende komt ghy tot my
But John forbad him, saying, I have need to be baptized of thee, and comest thou to me?
約翰想要攔住他，說：＂我當受你的洗，你反倒上我這裏來嗎？＂

S.FORM: Ra ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn; Mous-sâ hnyn, ka kidi-ato ymit-'æn ta k'ma-hynna ka pam't-au-mytta ta katiktik-an ka ymmud. Anna ta ni-mous-ato tyni-æn.
Ra nimattæ'ivli ta ti Jesus k'ma tyniæn; Moussâ hnyn, ka kidiato ymit'æn ta k'mahynna ka pam'taumytta ta katiktikan ka ymmud. Anna ta nimousato tyniæn.
S.TRANSL: Maer Jesus antwoordende sepde tot Hem -Laetnu af; Want aldus betaemt ons alle gerechtigheyt te berbullen,Doe lict hy ban em af.
And Jesus answering said unto him, Suffer it to be so now: for thus it becometh us to fulfil all righteousness. Then he suffered him.
耶穌回答說：＂你暫且許我，因為我們理當這樣盡諸般的義。＂於是約翰許了他。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-'æuloug-han ra ti Jesus, madys ni-mah-dakkin ka ni-makka-raloum. Ka k'ya-tey ni-luhtouas tyni-æn ta vullu-vullum, ka ni-k'ytt'-an tyn ta I-oep-an ki Alid, ka ni-mou-ra-rim mama ki padæugh 't-hgalap tyni-æn.
Irou ka ni'æuloughan ra ti Jesus, madys nimahdakkin ka nimakkaraloum. Ka k'yatey niluhtouas tyniæn ta vulluvullum, ka nik'ytt'an tyn ta Ioepan ki Alid, ka nimourarim mama ki padæugh 'thgalap tyniæn.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus gedoopt Iijnde is teritondt opghtâ€"_â€" lomklommen uyt het water. Ende siet de Hemelen wer den hem geopent ende hy sagh den Geelt Godts neder dalen gelyck een Duybe ende op hem-komen,
And Jesus, when he was baptized, went up straightway out of the water: and, lo, the heavens were opened unto him, and he saw the Spirit of God descending like a dove, and lighting upon him:
耶穌受了洗，隨即從水裏上來。天忽然為他開了，他就看見上帝的靈彷彿鴿子降下，落在他身上。

S.FORM: Kak'ytt'-ei ta yngau ka ni-makka-tounnoun ki vullu-vullum, ka ni-k'ma; Ti atta ta alak-au ka kavæango-en ka kamau-'nau ta teni. Ra-ahpat ki lbægh ki foulat.
Kak'ytt'ei ta yngau ka nimakkatounnoun ki vulluvullum, ka nik'ma; Ti atta ta alakau ka kavæangoen ka kamau'nau ta teni. Raahpat ki lbægh ki foulat.
S.TRANSL: Ende! fee! en comme upt de en se â€™ Dese is mijn Sone mijn Geliefde in den welcken ick mijn wel-behagen hebbe.
And lo a voice from heaven, saying, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.
從天上有聲音說：＂這是我的愛子，我所喜悅的。＂
